_provenance.notes: Descriptive snapshot of adobe.com's marketing surface. Token values aggregated from 7 captured pages; voice block sampled from home. Two brand-faithful inversions vs stardust hard-rules: pure black/white and backdrop-blur glassmorphism on nav. Adobe red (#eb1000) is reserved to brand-mnemonic + AI add-on contexts and is NOT a CTA color in any captured surface.

components.name: button-primary
components.treatment: Adobe blue solid, white label, 16px radius, 40h (32h --sm), pill not used here despite radius999 in samples — adobe.com inner uses 16-20px

components.name: button-outline
components.treatment: 1.5px black border, transparent bg, black label, 16px radius

components.name: card
components.treatment: Surface bg #f8f8f8, 20px radius (Adobe.com inner) or 16px (samples), 24px inset padding

components.name: link
components.treatment: Inherits color; underline on hover; CTA-like links classified as buttons in extract

primary.role: Saturated CTA on light surfaces; the only saturated color in the system

brand-mnemonic-red.role: RESERVED — Adobe lockup, AI add-on lockup gradient stop; NOT a CTA color

rules: Mixed-case display at weight 900 (Adobe Clean Display) for marquee headlines.
Period-terminated display sentences ("Transform how you share information.").
Tight letter-spacing on display (clamp negative values per samples).
typographyMeta.scaleNote: ad-hoc scale (ratios 1.286, 1.0, 1.273, 1.1). Adobe.com uses fluid clamp() sizing in the design samples; the cross-page weighted mode aggregates to discrete sizes (36/28/22/20/16/14).

rules: All scroll-coupled motion reads window.__lenis.scroll with window.scrollY fallback.
Page-load entrances: enterDown for nav, enterUp staggered for hero text (0/80/160ms).
Scroll-driven section entrances: opacity 0→1 + translateY 40→0, bidirectional, easeOut3.
CSS scroll-driven animations (animation-timeline: view(block)) used for garage-door reveal on full-bleed banners.
No GSAP, no ScrollTrigger, no IntersectionObserver in samples; same expected for migrated pages.

cards.innerNested: 4px solid #f8f8f8 (creates gap effect for nested-white-on-gray cards in samples)

patterns.name: card-grid
patterns.evidence: Every captured page has 4+ card-like elements in a grid layout

patterns.name: tile-mosaic
patterns.evidence: home + express lead with asymmetric tile rows over photographic imagery

patterns.name: rounded-top-section-overlap
patterns.evidence: Section primitives in samples (.stories, .plans-section) slide over the previous section with 32px top radius — Adobe.com inner uses subtler 20px curvature

tone.evidence: Short, period-terminated display sentences; mixed-case headings; verb-led terse CTAs; product-name eyebrow before benefit headline.

dont: TRANSFORM HOW YOU SHARE INFORMATION (uppercase shout)
Atelier-grade tools for the discerning creator (editorial register on a product brand)
Click here to start (vague link verb)

voiceTable.note: See _brand-extraction.json#voiceTable for the populated cross-page aggregations.

systemComponentRoles.position: fixed top, 8px outer padding, 64px inner pill, backdrop-blur
static bottom, 6-col link grid + featured products + bottom bar + wordmark reveal

brandFaithfulInversions.reason: adobe.com uses literal #000 and #ffffff as load-bearing surfaces. Captured across all 7 pages.
nav pill uses backdrop-filter: blur(64-128px) over rgba(255,255,255,0.64) on every captured page. Brand-faithful and load-bearing.

narrative.northStar: adobe.com's marketing surface is a multi-audience routing layer: tile-led IA, single-saturated-CTA color, photographic accent against grayscale chrome, dense rhythm over editorial flow.
narrative.overview: Adobe Clean / Adobe Clean Display type stack at 6 weights, Adobe blue #3b63fb as the only saturated CTA, 20px primary radius (Adobe.com inner) and 16px (samples), pill buttons, 8px base spacing, 64px section padding mode.
keyCharacteristics: Multi-audience routing IA, not editorial flow.
rules: Adobe blue #3b63fb is the only saturated CTA color.
Adobe red #eb1000 is reserved (brand mnemonic + AI add-on lockup).
Pure #000 and #ffffff are legal surfaces (Mode A inversion).
Backdrop-blur glassmorphism is legal on nav (Mode A inversion).
dos: Adobe Clean Display at weight 900 for marquee.
donts: Centered hero + dual CTA + gradient mesh (generic 2026-SaaS silhouette).
